SEND

KVK açıklaması

The purpose of the “Civil Aviation Cabin Services Program” is to train “Cabin Attendants”, who possess the necessary knowledge and equipment for the aviation sector, have influential communication skills, approach potential problems in a solution-oriented way, follow, investigate and question the up-to-date information about the occupation, are familiar with international regulations and are able to carry out operational activities.

Vertical Transfer Opportunities

Undergraduate programs that allow external transfer from this program are as follows:

Airline Operations,

Logistic Management,

Transportation and Logistics,

International Logistics,

Tourism and Hotel Management,

Civil Air Transport Operations

Career Opportunities

Graduates of this program can work at private aircraft companies that carry passengers in domestic and international routes, their headquarters, foreign aviation companies and all firms and companies that are related to civil aviation as cabin attendants.

Training Period

2 Years
